\centry{Private Academic Tutor}{SAT/ACT and College Counselor}{Palo Alto, CA}{September 2021 -- December 2023}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Delivered individualized instruction in Reading, Writing, and Mathematics to high school students preparing for standardized college admissions exams
  \item Supported students through the college application process, providing feedback on personal essays and guidance on school selection and financial aid strategy
\end{itemize}
